name: docs-cockpit
description: Project dashboard (Kanban + Sprint + KPI) + tree-sidebar markdown browser + frontmatter validator + cross-project portfolio in self-contained HTML files. Bilingual EN/中 toggle. 0.10.0 adds the **docs-cockpit-portfolio** skill + CLI: a user-level registry (`~/.docs-cockpit/projects.yaml`) for multi-project tracking, weekly snapshots, and multi-project weekly reports with week-over-week diffs. Includes **docs-cockpit-author** (canonical frontmatter schema), **docs-cockpit-standup** (single-project narrative), and **docs-cockpit lint** (structured `error`/`warn`/`hint` issues). Empty-docs modules show a copy-prompt CTA (Plan/RFC/Spec) for AI coding editors (Claude Code superpowers / gstack / Cursor / Codex / Continue / Aider).
//mcpServers: 0.12 M07-fdf16c · driver-seat mode 1 · Claude Code automatically registers this MCP server when the plugin is installed. Requires `pip install 'docs-cockpit[mcp]'` for the optional `mcp` SDK. Tools: cockpit_prompt / cockpit_apply_patch · Resource: cockpit://state.
